title: Cyberjaya smart traffic light systems efficacy questioned
snippet: While smart traffic light systems are in use in Cyberjaya to manage flow, experts question their long-term effectiveness in reducing congestion if private car ownership continues to rise unchecked in the tech hub.

title: Expect Delays: Repairs For MRT Putrajaya Line Still Ongoing After Cable Vandalism
snippet: Repairs for the MRT Putrajaya Line serving Cyberjaya are ongoing after cables were found cut, forcing commuters to rely on shuttle buses and causing significant delays across the corridor.

title: Proposed Putrajaya-Cyberjaya transit systems: Tram and Maglev
snippet: New transit systems, including Trams and Maglev projects, have been proposed to improve connectivity between Putrajaya and Cyberjaya, aiming to bridge the 'transit desert' gaps between the two administrative and tech hubs.
